name: Mysterious Shrine
description: An ancient shrine glows with ethereal light. A voice whispers: 'Sacrifice or receive?'

choices.text: Pray at the shrine (Lose 10 HP, gain a rare relic)
Leave an offering (Lose 50 gold, heal 20 HP)

name: Merchant in Distress
description: A merchant is being attacked by bandits! He cries for help.

choices.text: Help the merchant (Fight bandits, gain 100 gold)
Rob the merchant (Gain 75 gold, lose 5 max HP)

name: Ancient Library
description: Dusty tomes line endless shelves. Knowledge awaits those who seek it.

choices.text: Study combat techniques (Upgrade a random card)
Read forbidden texts (Gain a curse, gain a rare card)

name: Healing Fountain
description: Crystal-clear water flows from an ornate fountain. It radiates restorative energy.

choices.text: Fill a vial (Gain a healing potion)

name: The Card Master
description: A mysterious figure offers to enhance your deck... for a price.

name: Cursed Chest
description: A locked chest pulses with dark energy. Opening it could be dangerous...

choices.text: Force it open (50% chance: gain relic OR take 15 damage)

name: Scorched Earth
description: The path ahead is charred black. Massive claw marks gouge the stone. The air smells of sulfur and ash.

choices.text: Search the ruins (gain 30 gold, take 5 fire damage)
Prepare for what's ahead (upgrade a card)

name: Whispers of the Dead
description: Cold mist creeps along the ground. Ghostly whispers echo from nowhere. You feel watched by unseen eyes.

choices.text: Listen to the whispers (gain rare card, lose 10 HP)
